title: Warm up
content: Images depict scenes from Beijing, Chongqing, and Hangzhou, highlighting unique aspects of each city. The visuals emphasize elements like driving in Beijing, reading during travel in Chongqing, and technology use in Hangzhou.

title: AN EVOLVING NATION
content: The slide presents a visual narrative of China's evolution through images of taxis and cityscapes. It introduces the theme 'A Ride Through China' indicating a focus on urban changes.

title: Session 1 Match the City Chain!
content: The session outlines a structure for investigating and researching cities through local features, development strategies, and outcomes. This aims to explore the positive impact of these elements.
key_claims: Focus on development strategies and impact

title: Match the city to its development strategy
content: The slide aligns Beijing, Chongqing, and Hangzhou with their respective development strategies: technology and tradition integration, sustainable urban development, and tourism and economic growth.

title: Through the eyes of taxi drivers…
content: Taxi driving experiences illustrate development strategies like sustainable urban development, tourism and economic growth, and technology and tradition integration. The slide emphasizes that cities develop strategies based on local features.
